label: Subagent • spawn_model refuses a non-spawnable model
query: Spawn a model id that is not in the spawnable model pool.
notes: Negative guard, model-independent. spawn_model against an id that isn't in the spawnable model pool must be refused at resolve time (reject-before-evict) with a `rejected` envelope — never a silent run, and before any residency handoff. The case targets an explicit unseeded `model` id and does NOT seed it, so the pool gate fails. Because the case EXPECTS `rejected`, the availability-skip rule does NOT fire, so this scores normally on every host and every model. Pins the spawn_model pool gate that runs before the residency decision.
